div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Validates and fetches public
media from

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Extracts DOM refs and fetches
queued credentialed media
from

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Persists configuration,
lifecycle tab state,
aggregate telemetry,
capture/lifecycle outbox
rows, media tasks, and blobs
in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Posts /capture,
/visit-events, media
metadata, and raw blob
uploads to

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reads and writes metadata,
FTS, tasks, audit, and
receipts in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Stores, serves, purges, and
rehydrates media blobs in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Stores and serves media
during guarded-root outages
in

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
External web pages,
image/video URLs, and media
CDNs that Chrome loads or
that sidecars fetch as
page-related media.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Captures visible page text,
media references, tab
lifecycle events, and
browser-side media bytes from
Windows Chrome; queues work
durably and posts to the WSL
daemon.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Browser-side IndexedDB
storage for transactional
capture/lifecycle outbox rows
plus specialized durable
media tasks/blobs;
chrome.storage.local retains
typed configuration,
lifecycle tab state, minimal
CDP capture context,
aggregate telemetry, and
one-version queue fallback
only.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Authenticated loopback HTTP
API that handles capture,
visit events, media artifact
upload/fetch/purge, exact
search,
recent/timeline/detail,
policy rules, doctor, durable
forget, and static UI
serving.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Durable complete
cleaned-text, relational, and
full-text authority for
migration ledger, sources,
documents, visits, capture
observations, URL claims,
visit events, snapshots,
chunks, chunks_fts, media
provenance/tasks, blob
lifecycle records, policy
rules, audit events, and
deletion receipts.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Bounded disposable
image/video/audio bytes under
the configured media root;
explicit external roots
require mount and
identity-marker proof before
access.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Opt-in durable outage buffer
beneath the local WSL data
root; admission counts
committed files and distinct
in-flight SQLite
reservations, and drain
verifies bytes before tier
transition/source cleanup.
